Class DefaultProgressTracker

java.lang.Object
com.fastasyncworldedit.core.util.progress.DefaultProgressTracker
All Implemented Interfaces:
BiConsumer<DefaultProgressTracker.ProgressType, Integer>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ChatProgressTracker
public class DefaultProgressTracker extends Object implements BiConsumer<DefaultProgressTracker.ProgressType, Integer>
The default progress tracker uses titles
